name: QA 1721
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1721

Exercise the bpftrace PMDA - autostart script



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604 reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1721

Exercise the bpftrace PMDA - autostart script

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2604 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1721
